message:
refactor: Deduplicate WASI helpers and response construction

- wasi.ts: Remove encoder/decoder local aliases, use _encoder/_decoder
- wasi.ts: Extract concatChunks() for identical getStdout/getStderr
- wasi.ts: Extract removeFromParent() used by 3 path operations
- worker.ts: Extract textResponse() for 5 identical Response constructions
- python-do.ts: Fix dl_open empty-basename bug (endsWith("") always true)
